title: CENTENE CORPORATION SCHEDULES 2022 SECOND QUARTER FINANCIAL RESULTS CONFERENCE CALL
text: ST. LOUIS , June 30, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Centene Corporation (NYSE: CNC) today issued a reminder that it will release its 2022 second quarter financial results at approximately 6 a.m. (Eastern Time) on Tuesday, July 26, 2022, and will host a conference call afterwards at approximately 8:30 a.m.

title: Health Net Initiatives Recognized by Institute for Medicaid Innovation for Addressing Social Determinants of Health to Improve Health Equity
text: Initiatives expanded telehealth to California's most vulnerable residents; extended physical and mental health care to those without shelter; promoted healthy child development; and improved food access and education. SACRAMENTO, Calif.

title: Centene (CNC) Stock Jumps 6%: Will It Continue to Soar?
text: Centene (CNC) was a big mover last session on higher-than-average trading volume. The latest trend in earnings estimate revisions might help the stock continue moving higher in the near term.

title: Centene (CNC) Raises 2022 Guidance, Ups Share Buyback Fund
text: Currently, Centene (CNC) has $3.6 billion remaining under its share buyback program.

title: Centene raises profit outlook, will reduce real estate footprint as it adopts modern, flexible work environment
text: Shares of Centene Corp. CNC, -1.06% rallied 1.8% in premarket trading Friday, after the health care company raised its full-year profit and revenue outlook and added $3.0 billion to its stock repurchase program. The company also said it was reducing its real estate footprint, as part of its plan to adopt "a more modern, flexible work environment.

title: CENTENE CORPORATION ANNOUNCES INCREASED 2022 GUIDANCE AND VALUE CREATION UPDATES
text: 2022 Adjusted Diluted EPS of $5.55 to $5.70 Reduces Real Estate Footprint, Resulting in Long-Term Savings and One-Time Costs Board Authorizes $3 Billion Increase to Stock Repurchase Program and New $1 Billion Debt Repurchase Program ST. LOUIS , June 17, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Centene Corporation (NYSE: CNC) will host its June investor day today.

title: Buy The Dip On This Healthcare Stock
text: The shares of Centene Corp   (NYSE:CNC) are a far cry from their April 21, all-time high of $89.92, last seen at $77.18.

title: At-risk Medi-Cal Members Get Access to Vaccinations Through Health Net's Unique Care Collaboration
text: Innovative insurer and health equity pioneer works with MedArrive to provide vulnerable Medi-Cal members and their families access to in-home COVID-19 vaccinations SACRAMENTO, Calif. , June 15, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Health Net , one of California's longest serving and most experienced Medi-Cal partners, is offering in-home COVID-19 vaccinations to its most vulnerable members and their families.

title: 5 HMO Stocks Set to Gain From Membership Growth, M&A Strategy
text: Rising membership and a rapidly growing aging U.S. population are likely to drive the performances of the Zacks Medical-HMO industry players. UNH, ANTM, HUM, CNC and SEM are poised to benefit from improved operational efficiencies.
